title: Title
doc_html:
PART I-B.  PRISON REFORM ACT OF 1995

§737.  Title

This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Prison Reform Act of 1995".

Acts 1995, No. 810, §1.
doc_text:
PART I-B.  PRISON REFORM ACT OF 1995
§737.  Title
This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Prison Reform Act of 1995".
Acts 1995, No. 810, §1.
